name: Escalation Strategy
description: Agent must identify unresolvable blockages and selectively escalate.
input: State vector with unresolvable dependencies at index 0 and 1, risk level 0.9.
expected_output: Agent must sequentially use escalate action (4) on index 0 and 1 to mitigate total failure.
evaluation_criteria: Deterministic check for escalation actions specifically on index 0 and 1.
